en.lifeSummary: Thibaut de MELLIER was born about 1205 as the son of Hughes DE MELLIER and Lucie de MEZIERES. He married Catherine de FALKENSTEIN before 1236. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1271.
